resume_full_text: Bonu Swetha Devi Sai Priya — Cybersecurity Analyst based in Hyderabad. Currently Cybersecurity Analyst at TriArmour AI (since November 2024), handling identity, endpoint, and email investigations on the Microsoft security stack: Microsoft Sentinel, Defender for Endpoint, Defender for Office 365, Entra ID, and MDCA. Also teaches SOC operations, IAM, Zscaler, and ethical hacking to IT professionals. Concurrently L1 Threat Validation Analyst at CyberMSI. B.Tech in Cybersecurity. Certified Defensive Security Analyst (CDSA) from Hack The Box. Strong in KQL, MITRE ATT&CK mapping, 5W investigation documentation, detection engineering basics, and incident response triage. Currently building toward Threat Intelligence Researcher specializing in Malware Analysis — learning Ghidra, ANY.RUN, MalwareBazaar, MITRE ATT&CK, Diamond Model, STIX/TAXII. Maintains a public security portfolio at unabletofind.github.io with deep-dive blog posts on real incidents and APT analysis.
